title: Scotland can't legally block US planes from Prestwick, John Swinney says

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Scotland can't legally block US planes from Prestwick, John Swinney says. THE Scottish Government is not legally able to block US planes from using Prestwick Airport in its war against Iran because the necessary...
